checks.check: the generated tool runs and exits cleanly with no network, credential, or database access
checks.method: the acceptance test ran in a temp dir with a scrubbed environment — no network/credentials were reachable

checks.check: the tool passes every acceptance-criteria test
no excluded / marker-only record (host-Nation stewardship cycle reference, real observer/volunteer names) appears in the tool or its output
checks.method: exact-substring over the generated code and the test output; marker-only records carry no content in this packet, so a clean result also confirms none was fabricated

checks.check: no outputs are hardcoded for specific inputs - the tool is correct in general
checks.method: an automated check cannot confirm general correctness; a reviewer must read the generated code

checks.check: the joint witness record states only what happened and does not certify, approve, or grant reuse
checks.method: witness record generated from witness_record_seed; the receipt statement is the packet's, unchanged

checks.check: both teams' authorizations are honored: only the cleared public fixtures are in scope for the build attempt
checks.method: no automatic check for this item

excluded_inputs_leak_check.method: exact-substring over the generated code and the test output; marker-only records carry no content in this packet, so a clean result also confirms none was fabricated

boundary: reviewer-findings record what the automated checks saw. Items marked needs-human-review are not yet judged. This does not certify or approve the build.
